title: Office Relocation & Cleaning Transition — Jirsch Sutherland
excerpt: A national insolvency firm moves into a premium King Street office. Their previous cleaning contractor had become complacent. We completed the builders clean, identified what was needed, and delivered a weekly standard that matches the quality of the space.
challenge:
Jirsch Sutherland is a well-regarded national insolvency and restructuring firm. When they relocated to a new office on King Street in Newcastle, they brought their existing cleaning contractor with them — out of convenience, not confidence. The previous standard had dropped. Complacency had set in. Inconsistent teams, missed areas, and a general sense that nobody was really accountable.

For a firm of Jirsch Sutherland's calibre, operating out of a new, well-designed office, that gap between the quality of the space and the quality of the maintenance was a problem.
solution:
We were engaged to complete the builders clean for the new King Street office — a full post-construction clean that sets the baseline before a business moves in. It's detail work: every surface, every fixture, every square metre cleaned to a standard the builders leave behind.

During that engagement, we walked the space with the office manager and mapped it properly. Footprint, traffic patterns, high-touch surfaces, kitchen use, bathroom frequency, meeting room turnover. We scoped a weekly cleaning schedule that matched the actual needs of the office — not a generic template.

We presented the scope alongside our team structure: the same cleaner, every week, who knows the space and can be held accountable to it. Direct communication. Monthly audits. Written records.

Jirsch Sutherland made the switch.
outcome: The King Street office now runs to the standard it was designed for. The Jirsch Sutherland team walks into a clean space every Monday. The cleaner knows the office. The audits are clean. And the feedback loop is direct — if something needs attention, it's handled at the next visit, not escalated through a call centre.

quote.text: We came from a contractor who'd become complacent. The difference with YOS is straightforward — same person, every week, and if there's an issue, someone actually responds.
